commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; maintainers should run or review focused validation and merge if CI is clean.; Cleared: The diff only changes in-process plugin-loader memoization and cache invalidation, with no dependency, workflow, secret, or package-resolution change. (sha=3f25ea6433451d008054c6b86bb95f0ba4e96add)
commands.review_summary:
The PR memoizes `loadInstalledPluginIndexInstallRecordsSync` in `src/plugins/loader.ts`, uses the memo only as the fallback when callers do not supply install records, and clears it with plugin-loader cache invalidation.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main performs the sync install-record read before cache reuse, and the PR discussion includes real before/after Discord VPS timing and load-count proof; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; maintainers should run or review focused validation and merge if CI is clean.

target.title: fix(plugins): memoize loadInstalledPluginIndexInstallRecordsSync on hot path
target.body:
## Summary

- Memoize `loadInstalledPluginIndexInstallRecordsSync` result in `resolvePluginLoadCacheContext` so the sync file read does not fire on every `resolvePluginTools()` call, including LRU cache hits.
- Invalidate the memoized install records alongside the plugin loader cache in `clearPluginLoaderCache`.

Install records do not change at runtime, so the synchronous file read was redundant after the first call. This was causing unnecessary I/O on every plugin tool resolution, compounding under concurrent embedded runs.

## Verification

- `resolvePluginLoadCacheContext` uses `getMemoizedInstallRecords` instead of direct `loadInstalledPluginIndexInstallRecordsSync`.
- Cache cleared in `clearPluginLoaderCache`.
- Existing tests in `installed-plugin-index-records.test.ts` and `installed-plugin-index.test.ts` exercise the underlying function and remain unaffected.

Closes #77348
target.author: mushuiyu886

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
